41: public class CrudifierView<T> extends Panel implements IGenericComponent<T, CrudifierView<T>> {

45: 	private Map<Class<?>, IObjectRenderer<?>> renderers = new HashMap<Class<?>, IObjectRenderer<?>>();
46: 
47: 	public CrudifierView(String id, IModel<T> model) {
48: 		super(id, model);
49: 
50: 		StringResourceModel stringResourceModel = new StringResourceModel("viewLegend", this, getModel());
51: 		stringResourceModel.setDefaultValue("Unknown");
52: 		add(new Label("viewLegend", stringResourceModel){
53: 			private static final long serialVersionUID = -7854751811138463187L;
54: 
55: 			@Override
56: 			protected void onConfigure() {
57: 				super.onConfigure();

61: 		});
62: 
63: 
64: 
65: 	}
66: 	@Override
67: 	protected void onConfigure() {
68: 		super.onConfigure();
69: 
70: 		RepeatingView view = new RepeatingView("control");
71: 		if(null != getModelObject()) {
72: 			for(final String property : getPropertiesByOrder(getModelObject().getClass())){
73: 				WebMarkupContainer control = new WebMarkupContainer(view.newChildId());
74: 				view.addOrReplace(control);
75: 
76: 				StringResourceModel stringResourceModel = new StringResourceModel("controls."+property+".label", this, getModel());
77: 				stringResourceModel.setDefaultValue("Unknown");
78: 				control.addOrReplace(new Label("label", stringResourceModel));

81:

99: 
100: 		for(String property : entitySettings.getOrderOfFields()){
101: 			if(!entitySettings.getHiddenFields().contains(property))
102: 				properties.add(property);

104: 		for(PropertyDescriptor descriptor : PropertyUtils.getPropertyDescriptors(modelClass)){
105: 			if(!entitySettings.getHiddenFields().contains(descriptor.getName()) &&
106: 					!properties.contains(descriptor.getName()) &&
107: 					!descriptor.getName().equals("class"))
108: 				properties.add(descriptor.getName());
109: 		}
110: 
111: 		return properties;

20: import java.util.stream.Stream;
21: 
22: public class Main {
23:     public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
24:         if (args.length < 1) {
25:             System.err.println("Usage: java Main <source-directory>");
26:             System.exit(1);
27:         }
28: 
29:         String sourceDir = args[0];
30:         System.out.println("Processing source directory: " + sourceDir);
31: 
32:         int fixedCount = 0;
33:         try (Stream<Path> paths = Files.walk(Paths.get(sourceDir))) {
34:             paths.filter(p -> p.toString().endsWith(".java"))
35:                  .forEach(p -> {
36:                      try {
37:                          if (fixFile(p)) {
38:                              fixedCount++;
39:                          }
40:                      } catch (Exception e) {
41:                          System.err.println("Error processing " + p + ": " + e.getMessage());
42:                      }
43:                  });
44:         }
45: 
46:         System.out.println("Transformation complete. Fixed " + fixedCount + " files.");
47:     }
48: 
49:     private static boolean fixFile(Path filePath) throws IOException {
50:         String content = Files.readString(filePath);
51:         
52:         boolean hasJavaxValidation = content.contains("import javax.validation");
53:         boolean hasBeanutils = content.contains("import org.apache.commons.beanutils");
54:         boolean hasPropertyUtils = content.contains("PropertyUtils");
55:         
56:         if (!hasJavaxValidation && !hasBeanutils) {
57:             return false;
58:         }
59: 
60:         CompilationUnit cu = StaticJavaParser.parse(content);
61: 
62:         boolean modified = false;
63: 
64:         for (ImportDeclaration importDecl : cu.getImports()) {
65:             String importName = importDecl.getNameAsString();
66:             
67:             if (importName.startsWith("javax.validation")) {
68:                 String jakartaImport = importName.replace("javax.validation", "jakarta.validation");
69:                 importDecl.setName(jakartaImport);
70:                 modified = true;
71:                 System.out.println("  Replaced import: " + importName + " -> " + jakartaImport);
72:             }
73:             
74:             if (importName.equals("org.apache.commons.beanutils.PropertyUtils")) {
75:                 importDecl.remove();
76:                 modified = true;
77:                 System.out.println("  Removed import: " + importName);
78:                 
79:                 if (!cu.getImportByName("java.beans.Introspector").isPresent()) {
80:                     cu.addImport("java.beans.Introspector");
81:                     cu.addImport("java.beans.PropertyDescriptor");
82:                     cu.addImport("java.beans.IntrospectionException");
83:                     System.out.println("  Added java.beans imports");
84:                 }
85:             }
86:         }
87: 
88:         cu.findAll(MethodCallExpr.class).forEach(methodCall -> {
89:             if (methodCall.getScope().isPresent() && 
90:                 methodCall.getScope().get() instanceof NameExpr) {
91:                 NameExpr scope = (NameExpr) methodCall.getScope().get();
92:                 
93:                 if ("PropertyUtils".equals(scope.getNameAsString())) {
94:                     String methodName = methodCall.getNameAsString();
95:                     
96:                     if ("getPropertyDescriptors".equals(methodName)) {
97:                         methodCall.replaceWith(createGetPropertyDescriptorsReplacement(methodCall.getArguments()));
98:                         modified = true;
99:                         System.out.println("  Replaced PropertyUtils.getPropertyDescriptors call");
100:                     } else if ("getPropertyDescriptor".equals(methodName)) {
101:                         methodCall.replaceWith(createGetPropertyDescriptorReplacement(methodCall.getArguments()));
102:                         modified = true;
103:                         System.out.println("  Replaced PropertyUtils.getPropertyDescriptor call");
104:                     }
105:                 }
106:             }
107:         });
108: 
109:         if (modified) {
110:             String fixedContent = cu.toString();
111:             fixedContent = removeUnusedIntrospectionExceptionImport(fixedContent, content);
112:             Files.writeString(filePath, fixedContent);
113:         }
114: 
115:         return modified;
116:     }
117: 
118:     private static String removeUnusedIntrospectionExceptionImport(String newContent, String oldContent) {
119:         if (!oldContent.contains("IntrospectionException") && 
120:             newContent.contains("import java.beans.IntrospectionException;")) {
121:             return newContent.replace("import java.beans.IntrospectionException;\n", "");
122:         }
123:         return newContent;
124:     }
125: 
126:     private static MethodCallExpr createGetPropertyDescriptorsReplacement(NodeList<com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.Expression> args) {
127:         MethodCallExpr getBeanInfo = new MethodCallExpr(
128:             new NameExpr("Introspector"),
129:             "getBeanInfo",
130:             args
131:         );
132:         
133:         MethodCallExpr getPropertyDescriptors = new MethodCallExpr(
134:             getBeanInfo,
135:             "getPropertyDescriptors"
136:         );
137:         
138:         return getPropertyDescriptors;
139:     }
140: 
141:     private static MethodCallExpr createGetPropertyDescriptorReplacement(NodeList<com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.Expression> args) {
142:         if (args.size() >= 2) {
143:             com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.Expression objArg = args.get(0);
144:             com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.Expression nameArg = args.get(1);
145:             
146:             MethodCallExpr getBeanInfo = new MethodCallExpr(
147:                 new NameExpr("Introspector"),
148:                 "getBeanInfo",
149:                 new NodeList<>(
150:                     new MethodCallExpr(objArg, "getClass")
151:                 )
152:             );
153:             
154:             MethodCallExpr getPropertyDescriptors = new MethodCallExpr(
155:                 getBeanInfo,
156:                 "getPropertyDescriptors"
157:             );
158:             
159:             MethodCallExpr streamCall = new MethodCallExpr(
160:                 new MethodCallExpr(
161:                     new NameExpr("java.util.Arrays"),
162:                     "stream",
163:                     new NodeList<>(getPropertyDescriptors)
164:                 ),
165:                 "filter"
166:             );
167:             
168:             com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.LambdaExpr lambda = new com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.LambdaExpr(
169:                 new com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.ParameterList(new com.github.javaparser.ast.body.Parameter(
170:                     new ClassOrInterfaceType(null, "PropertyDescriptor"),
171:                     new com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.SimpleName("pd")
172:                 )),
173:                 new MethodCallExpr(
174:                     new MethodCallExpr(
175:                         new NameExpr("pd"),
176:                         "getName"
177:                     ),
178:                     "equals",
179:                     new NodeList<>(nameArg)
180:                 )
181:             );
182:             streamCall.getArguments().add(0, lambda);
183:             
184:             MethodCallExpr findFirst = new MethodCallExpr(streamCall, "findFirst");
185:             MethodCallExpr orElse = new MethodCallExpr(findFirst, "orElse", new NodeList<>(new NameExpr("null")));
186:             
187:             return orElse;
188:         }
189:         
190:         return new MethodCallExpr(null, "null");
191:     }
192: }

(End of file - total 192 lines)

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
	<modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

	<groupId>com.premiumminds</groupId>
	<artifactId>wicket-crudifier</artifactId>
	<version>4.3-SNAPSHOT</version>
	<packaging>jar</packaging>

	<name>wicket-crudifier</name>
	<description>wicket-crudifier is a library to easily create CRUD's with wicket</description>
	<inceptionYear>2014</inceptionYear>

	<organization>
		<name>Premium Minds</name>
		<url>http://www.premium-minds.com</url>
	</organization>

	<licenses>
		<license>
			<name>GNU LESSER GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE</name>
			<url>http://www.gnu.org/licenses/lgpl.html</url>
		</license>
	</licenses>

	<url>https://github.com/premium-minds/wicket-crudifier</url>

	<scm>
		<url>https://github.com/premium-minds/wicket-crudifier</url>
		<connection>scm:git:git@github.com:premium-minds/wicket-crudifier.git</connection>
		<developerConnection>scm:git:git@github.com:premium-minds/wicket-crudifier.git</developerConnection>
		<tag>HEAD</tag>
	</scm>

	<developers>
		<developer>
			<name>André Camilo</name>
			<organization>Premium Minds</organization>
		</developer>
	</developers>

	<properties>
		<wicket.version>8.15.0</wicket.version>
		<project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
		<maven.compiler.source>1.8</maven.compiler.source>
		<maven.compiler.target>1.8</maven.compiler.target>
	</properties>

	<dependencies>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.apache.wicket</groupId>
			<artifactId>wicket-core</artifactId>
			<version>${wicket.version}</version>
			<scope>provided</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.apache.wicket</groupId>
			<artifactId>wicket-extensions</artifactId>
			<version>${wicket.version}</version>
			<scope>provided</scope>
		</dependency>

		<dependency>
			<groupId>com.premiumminds</groupId>
			<artifactId>pm-wicket-utils</artifactId>
			<version>5.0</version>
		</dependency>

		<!-- TEST DEPENDENCIES -->
		<dependency>
			<groupId>junit</groupId>
			<artifactId>junit</artifactId>
			<version>4.13.2</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>jakarta.servlet</groupId>
			<artifactId>jakarta.servlet-api</artifactId>
			<version>4.0.4</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.easymock</groupId>
			<artifactId>easymock</artifactId>
			<version>5.1.0</version>
			<scope>test</scope>
		</dependency>
	</dependencies>
	<build>
		<plugins>
			<plugin>
				<inherited>true</inherited>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.11.0</version>
				<configuration>
					<source>1.8</source>
					<target>1.8</target>
					<optimize>true</optimize>
					<debug>true</debug>
				</configuration>
			</plugin>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-source-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.3.0</version>
				<executions>
					<execution>
						<id>attach-sources</id>
						<goals>
							<goal>jar-no-fork</goal>
						</goals>
					</execution>
				</executions>
			</plugin>
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-javadoc-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.5.0</version>
				<executions>
					<execution>
						<id>attach-javadocs</id>
						<goals>
							<goal>jar</goal>
						</goals>
					</execution>
				</executions>
			</plugin>

			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.3.0</version>
				<configuration>
					<archive>
						<manifestEntries>
							<Automatic-Module-Name>com.premiumminds.wicket.crudifier</Automatic-Module-Name>
						</manifestEntries>
					</archive>
				</configuration>
			</plugin>

			<plugin>
				<groupId>com.mycila.maven-license-plugin</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-license-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>1.10.b1</version>
				<configuration>
					<header>licence-preamble.txt</header>
					<strictCheck>true</strictCheck>
					<failIfMissing>true</failIfMissing>
					<includes>
						<include>src/**</include>
						<include>**/test/**</include>
					</includes>
					<excludes>
						<exclude>target/**</exclude>
					</excludes>
					<mapping>
						<yml>SCRIPT_STYLE</yml>
					</mapping>
					<properties>
						<project-name>${project.name}</project-name>
						<year>2014</year>
						<owner>Premium Minds</owner>
					</properties>
				</configuration>
			</plugin>

			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-release-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.0.1</version>
				<configuration>
					<autoVersionSubmodules>true</autoVersionSubmodules>
					<useReleaseProfile>false</useReleaseProfile>
					<releaseProfiles>release</releaseProfiles>
					<tagNameFormat>v@{project.version}</tagNameFormat>
					<goals>deploy</goals>
				</configuration>
				<dependencies>
					<dependency>
						<groupId>org.apache.maven.scm</groupId>
						<artifactId>maven-scm-provider-gitexe</artifactId>
						<version>2.0.0</version>
					</dependency>
					<dependency>
						<groupId>org.apache.maven.scm</groupId>
						<artifactId>maven-scm-api</artifactId>
						<version>2.0.0</version>
					</dependency>
				</dependencies>
			</plugin>
			
			<plugin>
				<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
				<artifactId>maven-scm-publish-plugin</artifactId>
				<version>3.2.1</version>
				<configuration>
					<checkoutDirectory>${project.build.directory}/scmpublish</checkoutDirectory>
					<checkinComment>Publishing javadoc for ${project.artifactId}:${project.version}</checkinComment>
					<content>${project.reporting.outputDirectory}</content>
					<skipDeletedFiles>true</skipDeletedFiles>
					<pubScmUrl>scm:git:git@github.com:premium-minds/wicket-crudifier.git</pubScmUrl>
					<scmBranch>gh-pages</scmBranch> <!-- branch with static site -->
				</configuration>
			</plugin>
			
		</plugins>

		<resources>
			<resource>
				<directory>src/main/resources</directory>
				<includes>
					<include>**</include>
				</includes>
			</resource>
			<resource>
				<directory>src/main/java</directory>
				<includes>
					<include>**</include>
				</includes>
				<excludes>
					<exclude>**/*.java</exclude>
				</excludes>
			</resource>
		</resources>
	</build>

	<profiles>
		<profile>
			<id>release</id>
			<build>
				<plugins>
					<!-- OSS Sonatype stuff -->
					<plugin>
						<groupId>org.sonatype.plugins</groupId>
						<artifactId>nexus-staging-maven-plugin</artifactId>
						<version>1.6.13</version>
						<extensions>true</extensions>
						<configuration>
							<serverId>premiumminds-nexus-staging</serverId>
							<nexusUrl>https://oss.sonatype.org/</nexusUrl>
							<autoReleaseAfterClose>true</autoReleaseAfterClose>
						</configuration>
					</plugin>
					<plugin>
						<groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
						<artifactId>maven-gpg-plugin</artifactId>
						<version>3.0.1</version>
						<executions>
							<execution>
								<id>sign-artifacts</id>
								<phase>verify</phase>
								<goals>
									<goal>sign</goal>
								</goals>
							</execution>
						</executions>
					</plugin>
				</plugins>
			</build>
		</profile>
	</profiles>

	<distributionManagement>

		<snapshotRepository>
			<id>premiumminds-nexus-snapshots</id>
			<name>premiumminds-nexus-snapshots</name>
			<url>https://oss.sonatype.org/content/repositories/snapshots </url>
			<snapshots>
				<enabled>true</enabled>
			</snapshots>
		</snapshotRepository>

		<repository>
			<id>premiumminds-nexus-staging</id>
			<name>premiumminds-nexus-staging</name>
			<url>https://oss.sonatype.org/service/local/staging/deploy/maven2 </url>
		</repository>

	</distributionManagement>
</project>
